news.headline: WHO declares global health emergency over Ebola outbreak in DR Congo
news.summary: General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus declared the Ebola disease outbreak in Congo and neighboring Uganda a public health emergency of international concern on Sunday after more than 300 suspected cases and 88 deaths. news.headline: Joint US-Nigeria operation killed a senior militant leader of IS
news.summary: President Donald Trump said that a joint operation by U.S. and Nigerian forces killed a top leader of the Islamic State group in Nigeria.

news.headline: How Birding Apps Are Boosting Tourism in the World’s Top Bird Destination
news.summary: Colombia is home to the most species of birds known to ornithologists. Merlin, an app, is helping to build an “avian tourism” industry there.
